title: rubus schmidelioides var. subpauperatus
intro: Rubus schmidelioides var. subpauperatus, also known as a variety of the raspberry species, is a plant native to certain regions in China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain cancers. Traditionally, Rubus schmidelioides var. subpauperatus is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
